colours.name: Red
colours.description: Range of red colours including anthocyanin-based options and beet sources for vibrant colour with responsible supply chain
key_properties: pH dependent hue shift to purple

colours.name: Orange
colours.description: Cost-effective and reliable orange shades from annatto and paprika ranging from light golden yellow-orange to dark red-oranges

colours.name: Yellow
colours.description: Range of yellow shades from pale butter to rich gold for energizing experiences using stable emulsions and natural sources

colours.name: Green
colours.description: Vibrant nature-inspired green colours with supply chain transparency using chlorophyll and chlorophyllin extracts

colours.name: Blue
colours.description: True blue colours without purple or green undertones from phycocyanins for cool and calming experiences

colours.name: Brown
colours.description: Comprehensive range of brown solutions from simple label options to caramel colours for rich comforting experiences

colours.name: Black
colours.description: Intensely dark colour for adventurous and indulgent experiences with excellent pourability and dispersion

company.name: Givaudan Sense Colour
company.description: Global supplier of natural colours, caramel colours, burnt sugars, and fruit and vegetable-based browns with 155+ years of colouring expertise, solely focused on creating brilliant natural colours for multisensorial food and beverage experiences

locations.description: Global Support Center and production facility
Office and plant in Trafford Park
Production facility at Little Island Industrial Estate
Production facility at Tg. Langsat Industrial Complex

products.name: Amaize Red
products.description: Anthocyanin colour from purple corn grown in North America with vertically integrated supply chain

products.name: Vegebrite Black Carrot
products.description: Red water-soluble anthocyanin colour extracted from black/purple carrots grown in southern Europe and Asia

products.name: emSeal Paprika
products.description: Natural colour emulsion from peppers grown for high-colour, low-heat properties

products.name: emSeal Beta-carotene
products.description: Stable bright golden-yellow carotenoid color from vegetables and algae

products.name: Veriphyl Chlorophyll
products.description: Vibrant green natural food colour extracted from fescue grass grown in the UK

products.name: Everzure Spirulina
products.description: Vibrant natural blue colour extracted from blue-green algae cultivated for colour

products.name: Naturbrown
products.description: Browns made by cooking fruit or vegetable juice concentrates for simple label appeal

products.name: Class I Caramel Colour
products.description: Plain caramels ranging from light yellow-brown to dark red-brown for depth and richness

products.name: Class IV Caramel Color
products.description: Darkest caramels available ranging from medium brown to deep black-brown

products.name: Vegetable Carbon Black
products.description: Intensely dark natural food colour made from charred vegetable matter in liquid form

industries.name: Bakery
industries.description: Natural colours for bakery items to help products stand out on shelf and create memorable experiences
solutions: heat stable colours for extended bake times
mild processing colours for cream fillings

industries.name: Beverages
industries.description: Natural colours for beverages with selection greatly influenced by pH and enhanced beverage ingredients
solutions: low hue powders for dry mixes

industries.name: Confections
industries.description: Natural colours for confections benefiting from high acidity and low moisture for vibrant hues

industries.name: Dairy
industries.description: Dairy products generally refrigerated or frozen with wide array of colour options available
solutions: acid stable options for cultured products

industries.name: Meat Alternatives
industries.description: Plant-based proteins requiring colours to deliver same look, taste, and experience as traditional meat
solutions: yellow to red range for raw look

industries.name: Pet Food
industries.description: Pet food requiring same quality colours as human food for pet owner confidence

industries.name: Savoury
industries.description: Savoury applications with browns as most widely used colours, requiring salt stability

industries.name: Snacks
industries.description: Range of processing methods requiring heat stable colours with consideration for base materials

industries.name: Vitamins & Supplements
industries.description: Wide range of applications from gummy vitamins to protein pre-mixes requiring different processing considerations

innovations.name: Everzure Galdieria

innovations.name: emSeal Technology

innovations.name: Veriphyl Traceability
innovations.description: Supply chain transparency system providing traceability back to the field for chlorophyll products

innovations.name: Amaize Vertical Integration
innovations.description: Vertically integrated supply chain for purple corn anthocyanin with transparency to farmer level

innovations.name: Vibrant Powders
innovations.description: Vivid appearance powder colours designed for bold snack seasonings

sustainability.strategy: Protecting planet, colleagues, customers and consumers, safeguarding future of business as integral part of everyday work aligned with company purpose of 'creating happier, healthier lives with love for nature'
